prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is the original verbatim passage? The other passages are paraphrased versions of it.

Options:
A. The 2023 San Miguel Corporation (SMC) - Philippine Sportswriters Association (PSA) Annual Awards was an annual awarding ceremony honoring the individuals (athletes, teams, officials and organizations) and organizations that made a significant impact to Philippine sports in 2022. The awarding ceremony was held at the March 6, 2023, at the Grand Ballroom of the Diamond Hotel in Manila. More than 100 sports personalities and entities will be bestowed in the awarding ceremony, highlighted by the crowing of Athlete of the Year to World Championships gold medalist Hidilyn Diaz.Philippine Sports Commission Chairman Richard "Dickie" Bachmann and Philippine Olympic Committee President Abraham "Bambol" Tolentino has been invited to witness the affair, while Project: Gintong Alay Director and Laoag, Ilocos Norte Mayor Michael Marcos Keon will serve as a guest speaker.The
B. The annual San Miguel Corporation (SMC) - Philippine Sportswriters Association (PSA) Annual Awards are a tribute to the individuals and organizations that have made a significant impact on Philippine sports in 2022. The awarding ceremony took place on March 6, 2023, at the Grand Ballroom of the Diamond Hotel in Manila. The ceremony will include more than 100 sports personalities and entities, with Athlete of the Year being awarded to Hidilyn Diaz from World Championships. Philly Sports Commission Chairman Richard "Dickie" Bachmann and Project: Actos.
C. The 2023 San Miguel Corporation (SMC) - Philippine Sportswriters Association (PSA) Annual Awards comprised an annual ceremony dedicated to recognizing the individuals (including athletes, teams, officials, and organizations) and various organizations that profoundly influenced Philippine sports during the year 2022. This prestigious awarding event took place on March 6, 2023, within the Grand Ballroom of the Diamond Hotel situated in Manila. Over 100 sports figures and groups were slated to receive accolades during the ceremony, with a particular highlight being the conferment of the Athlete of the Year title upon Hidilyn Diaz, the World Championships gold medalist. Philippine Sports Commission Chairman Richard "Dickie" Bachmann and Philippine Olympic Committee President Abraham "Bambol" Tolentino received invitations to attend and observe the proceedings. Furthermore, Project: Gintong Alay Director and the Mayor of Laoag, Ilocos Norte, Michael Marcos Keon, was scheduled to fulfill the role of a distinguished guest speaker.

Answer:
